description_long: This object is a bold, solid orange directional sign shaped as a right-pointing arrow. The sign consists of a thick rectangular shaft and a large triangular arrowhead, both seamlessly joined and uniformly colored. Its surfaces are flat and smooth, with sharp, clean edges and a matte finish that reduces glare. The sign is devoid of any text, symbols, or additional markings, making it highly visible and easy to interpret from a distance. The robust construction suggests it is designed for outdoor use, likely to withstand various weather conditions. Its simple, geometric form ensures clear communication of direction in busy urban environments.
description: A solid orange, right-pointing arrow sign with a thick rectangular shaft and a large triangular head, featuring smooth, matte surfaces and no text.
description_view_0: The sign is seen from the side, clearly displaying the full arrow shape with the rectangular shaft and triangular head pointing right.
description_view_1: The sign is viewed edge-on, making the arrow appear as a thin vertical line with minimal visible surface area.
description_view_2: The sign is seen from the opposite side, showing the arrowhead pointing left and the rectangular shaft, mirroring view 0.
description_view_3: The sign is viewed from the rear edge, showing the thickness of the shaft and the back of the arrowhead, with little surface detail visible.
